basics.name: Sahil Chhabra
basics.title: B.Tech UG | VLSI Design | Passionate About AI and Automation | Mixed Signal Designing | Verilog | Cadence Virtuoso
basics.summary:
Passionate about Technology | Lifelong Learner | Problem Solver

I am an enthusiastic and dedicated Electronic Engineering Student - VLSI Engineer with a strong foundation in digital design, Verilog. I thrive on learning new technologies and applying them to solve real-world problems.

With hands-on experience in Cadence simulations, Verilog codes. I enjoy turning concepts into functional solutions and continuously enhancing my technical expertise.

I am particularly interested in VLSI design, embedded systems, hardware design, innovation in semiconductor technologies and actively seek opportunities to contribute, collaborate, and grow in challenging environments.

I believe in lifelong learning, creative problem solving, and building impactful solutions that bridge theory with practical applications.

Always open to networking, collaborations, and exciting opportunities in technology and engineering.

experience.company: Chip Crafters - The VLSI Club of VIPS-TC

items: Design of 8-Bit ALU focusing on Low-Power and Low-Temperature conditions in Cadence Virtuoso at 180 nm Technology.
Design of Adiabatic AND & NAND gates using Transmission Gates in Cadence Virtuoso at 180nm Technology.
Design and Stability Analysis of a 6T-SRAM Cell using Butterfly Curve (Static Noise Margin) in Cadence Virtuoso.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology - BTech in Electronics Engineering specialization in VLSI (Very Large Scale Integration)
